<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ final class MysqliCaster { public static function castMysqliDriver(\mysqli_driver $c, array $a, Stub $stub, bool $isNested): array { foreach ($a as $k => $v) { if (isset($c->$k)) { $a[$k] = $c->$k; } } return $a; } }
